name: Farmhouse Barbecue Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Separate the dough into 10 biscuits and flatten them into 5-inch circles.
2. Press each biscuit into the bottom and up the sides of a greased muffin cup. Set aside.
3. In a skillet, brown the ground beef and drain.
4. In a small bowl, mix ketchup, brown sugar, cider vinegar, and chili powder until smooth.
5. Add the meat mixture to the skillet and stir well.
6. Divide the meat mixture among the biscuit-lined muffin cups, using about 1/4 cup for each.
7. Sprinkle shredded cheddar cheese on top of each muffin.
8. Bake at 375 degrees Fahrenheit for 18-20 minutes or until golden brown.
9. Cool for 5 minutes before removing from the tin and serving.
Yields: 10 muffins
Source: Taste of Home Magazine
Author: Debbie Carlson
